NEW DELHI -(Dow Jones)- Enron Corp. (ENE) said it has signed a definitive agreement to buy the Dabhol Power Co. (DPC) from the Maharashtra State Electricity Board (MSEB). 
"We have signed a definitive agreement to buy Dabhol Power Co. from the Maharashtra State Electricity Board," Enron spokesman Mark Palmer said in a statement.

"We look forward to completing the transaction and to working with the Maharashtra State Electricity Board to ensure that the project is completed on time and on budget."
